marketing.headline: Trustworthy AI bookkeeping for Sweden-first teams.
marketing.subheadline: Compliance-critical flows stay deterministic. AI guides, cites, and accelerates the review surface.
marketing.demoNotice: Demo mode is intentionally using local scaffold behavior so it is never mistaken for live accounting.

captureLane.description: Camera, paste, upload, and share land in the same queue and show where the draft was stored.

innovation.description: Voice capture, simulations, and close copilot are isolated from posting authority until they earn trust.

shell.demoBanner: Demo mode is active. Local demo data and local AI fallback are enabled intentionally.

captureSheet.title: Add business evidence
captureSheet.description: Capture starts locally first so the UI stays responsive. The result tells you whether the draft was stored persistently or only for this tab.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

captureStatus.session: {mode} draft saved for this browser tab only.
captureStatus.memory: {mode} draft saved in temporary memory for this tab only.
captureStatus.error: {mode} draft could not be saved locally. Check browser storage permissions and try again.

today.title: Review-ready bookkeeping, shaped for the phone first.
today.description: Evidence arrives once, suggestions stay explainable, and the queue keeps the real accounting work above the fold instead of hiding it under dashboard chrome.
today.queueTitle: Keep the next accounting decision obvious.
today.queueDescription: Cards stay compact on mobile, expand on larger screens, and keep AI reasoning behind secondary disclosure until it is needed.
today.editToast: Edit will be available in a future release.

capture.title: Add evidence, see drafts, browse the archive.
capture.description: The single home for everything you've captured — drafts in progress, freshly uploaded, fully archived.

quickAdd.title: Quick add
quickAdd.description: Each tile creates a local draft you can promote into ledger evidence.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

quickAdd.importError: Could not import the SIE file.

drafts.title: Drafts in progress
drafts.empty: No local drafts. Use Quick add above or the capture button.

archive.title: Evidence archive
archive.empty: No archived evidence yet. Promote a draft above to populate the archive.
